calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-13-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Breall for Darragh Flynn.

Mr. Breall stated that he filed additional papers on Friday in response to the Examiner's notes regarding the legal description of the property, a declaration regarding the disclaimers and that there are no predeceased heirs. The First and Final Report of Administrator, etc. is taken under submission pending receipt of a revised order to include the property description.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
